wording: At 20% budget, blind MI (P3) significantly reduces strict-distance vs random (P2) in LR panel (diff +0.051, 95% CI[+0.008,+0.087], cluster-bootstrap). Simple and boundary mechanisms drive the advantage; structured mechanisms do not.
limitation: LR only; not yet tested on tree/neural models.

wording: Provenance/lifecycle metadata increment not tested. P4/P5 NOT_APPLICABLE in current bundle protocol.
limitation: Requires operational metadata not present in frozen task bundles.

wording: Governance effectiveness is strongly mechanism-dependent. Simple: P3 sdr +0.125, recall 0.93. Structured: P3 sdr -0.017, recall 0.30 (CI crosses zero). Boundary: moderate.
limitation: LR only; cross-model consistency not yet evaluated.

wording: Even 1% budget captures 40%+ recall with 97.6% legitimate retention. Small budget captures substantial fraction of achievable repair.
limitation: Achievable recall ceiling is mechanism-dependent (simple >> structured).
